subject: Wave 1 Batch I-C: reverse-engine-recursive-run, 4-ivi374-F0Rivi4, linguistic-atomization-framework
description: Write and deploy READMEs for 3 ORGAN-I repos. reverse-engine is an arch governance toolkit, 4-ivi374 is a blueprint-only repo, linguistic-atomization is a full Python app that may already have adequate docs.
